'''kathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bacteriologically|bacteriologically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bacteriologically|bacteriologically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kathate|kathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kathatesher|kathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathatesherĂ«m|kathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kathatero|kathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kathateshĂ«|kathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathateshĂ«m|kathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikathatero|gokikathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikathateshĂ«|gokikathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikathateshĂ«m|gokikathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokathankerom|gokathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokathankeshĂ«|gokathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokathankeshĂ«m|gokathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokathankeya|gokathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kathaterom|kathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathatemu|kathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kathateya|kathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikathaterom|gokikathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikathatemu|gokikathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikathateya|gokikathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kathathate|kathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kathathatesher|kathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathathatesherĂ«m|kathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kathathatero|kathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kathathateshĂ«|kathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathathateshĂ«m|kathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikathathatero|gokikathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikathathateshĂ«|gokikathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikathathateshĂ«m|gokikathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokathathankerom|gokathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokathathankeshĂ«|gokathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokathathankeshĂ«m|gokathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokathathankeya|gokathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kathathaterom|kathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kathathatemu|kathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kathathateya|kathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikathathaterom|gokikathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikathathatemu|gokikathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikathathateya|gokikathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠte|kĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠtesher|kĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠtero|kĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠtero|gokikĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠterom|kĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠtemu|kĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠthĂŠteya|kĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠterom|gokikĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠthĂŠteya|gokikĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafthafte|kafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafthaftesher|kafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafthaftesherĂ«m|kafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafthaftero|kafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafthafteshĂ«|kafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafthafteshĂ«m|kafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafthaftero|gokikafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafthafteshĂ«|gokikafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafthafteshĂ«m|gokikafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafthafnkerom|gokafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafthafnkeshĂ«|gokafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafthafnkeshĂ«m|gokafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafthafnkeya|gokafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafthafterom|kafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafthaftemu|kafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafthafteya|kafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafthafterom|gokikafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafthaftemu|gokikafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafthafteya|gokikafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
